name: IsoStatus
summary: Defines enumerated values for isoparametric curve direction on a surface, such as X or Y, and curve sides, such as North or West boundary. Note: odd values are all x-constant; even values > 0 are all y-constant.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: curve is not an isoparametric curve.

enum_values.name: X
enum_values.summary: curve is a "x" = constant (vertical) isoparametric curve in the interior of the surface's domain.

enum_values.name: Y
enum_values.summary: curve is a "y" = constant (horizontal) isoparametric curve in the interior of the surface's domain.

enum_values.name: West
enum_values.summary: curve is a "x" = constant isoparametric curve along the west side of the surface's domain.

enum_values.name: South
enum_values.summary: curve is a "y" = constant isoparametric curve along the south side of the surface's domain.

enum_values.name: East
enum_values.summary: curve is a "x" = constant isoparametric curve along the east side of the surface's domain.

enum_values.name: North
enum_values.summary: curve is a "y" = constant isoparametric curve along the north side of the surface's domain.
